Room.title: Room
Room.description: A game room where players join to play.

id.description: The unique 4-6 character code for the room.

hostId.description: The user ID of the room creator.

maxNumber.description: The maximum number players can choose (e.g., 21, 31, 41).

status.description: The current status of the game.

turn.description: The user ID of the player whose turn it is.

turnOrder.description: The ordered list of user IDs determining play order.

guesses.description: The list of numbers that have already been guessed.

loser.description: The user ID of the player who lost the game.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: A player inside a game room.

userId.description: The user ID of the player.

displayName.description: The display name of the player.

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the player.

secretNumber.description: The secret number chosen by the player.

isEliminated.description: Whether the player has been eliminated.

joinedAt.description: When the player joined the room.

/rooms/{roomId}/players/{userId}.description: Stores players within a specific game room.
